title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Daikin India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Daikin India
jsonLd.description:
We at Daikin India are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Daikin India:
Daikin India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Daikin India!
